---
name: Feature Request
about: Propose a new feature or enhancement
title: "[FEAT] "
labels: ["enhancement", "needs-triage"]
---

## Description
What is the feature or improvement you're proposing?

## Use case
Why is this needed? Who benefits?

## Acceptance criteria
- [ ] Criterion 1
- [ ] Criterion 2

## Priority & Track
- **Priority**: P0 - Critical / P1 - High / P2 - Medium / P3 - Low
- **Track**: Platform / UX / Automation / Docs / Observability
